title: Patch::Keep serializer returns hard Err, not debug_assert+silent null
description: Patch::Keep being serialized directly is a programmer error: it means the field struct is missing #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Patch::is_keep")]. In the old code, Patch::Keep serialized as null in release builds (the debug_assert fired only in debug). That silently cleared the server-side field, which is the exact wrong behavior — Keep means leave unchanged. The hard Err surfaced at integration time, not silently in production. A contributor might suggest reverting to the debug_assert to avoid a serializer error. Do not: silent data corruption is worse than a loud failure.
close_reason: Decision recorded during idfq epic implementation; design intentionally retained as-is.
